name: Cosmic Core Art Portal
description: Full-featured WiFi captive portal on M5Stack Core 1. Hosts 70+ generative art animations, cosmic trivia (100 questions), visitor guestbook (SD-backed), SD file gallery with password protection, screensaver system (Matrix Rain, Starfield, Plasma, SD image shuffle), and operator preset messages via physical buttons. Connect to 'COSMIC-CORE FILE GALLERY' AP to explore. BtnB to send preset messages when visitors are connected.
author: CoreyMillia
